connect.rule.ruletriggereventsource.CfnA: The name of the event source.

connect.rule.ruletriggereventsource.Even.Description: The name of the event source.

connect.rule.ruletriggereventsource.Inte.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the integration association. `IntegrationAssociationArn` is required if `TriggerEventSource` is one of the following values: `OnZendeskTicketCreate` | `OnZendeskTicketStatusUpdate` | `OnSalesforceCaseCreate`
